description: An instant strike that deals 110 / Sinister Calling: 111 / Sinister Calling: 112 / Sinister Calling: 113 / Sinister Calling: 114% weapon damage and causes the target to hemorrhage, increasing any Physical damage dealt to the target by up to 42. Lasts 10 charges or 15 sec. Awards 1 combo point.
name: Hemorrhage
